name: Bowie Lewinn | BFF's brother
description:
'What? Got a staring problem or something?'

🕱

You and Zoe have been best friends for years - you practically spent your entire life growing up in each other's homes. You've known Bowie for years as well, though mostly just as Zoe's little brother who was a little attached to you. It was cute, how he clung to you whenever you visited. And then you went to college, while Zoe stayed home, and now you're back and Bowie wasn't really the clingy boy he used to be. Now he's... emo (or at least that's what Zoe said) and almost definitely flirting with you, or is he? It's kind of hard to tell with Bowie.

┌────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────┐

AnyPov / User can be anyone, Bowie is only a couple of years younger than you.

CW:

transphobia in backstory

┌────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────┐

Bowie's bedroom

┌────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────┐

Bot Template I used (with very slight modifications) - credits @Ioverths

I use JLLM, so I'm not sure too much about how this will work with other models.

Make a Request!

My own bot gave me gender envy smh

Also as a trans man, Bowie's experience with being trans is very similar to my own as in how he just wants to be perceived as a man but doesn't struggle much with his own appearance. I don't think I've really seen any trans bots like this on the site, so I kinda wanted to make my own. Plus I wanted to make an emo so yk killing two birds with one stone lol
creator: jojini
